name: ClawWatch
description: ClawWatch node agent: register with Worker (https://cw.osglab.win), bind via link token or binding code, and report telemetry. Ships clawwatch-agent CLI plus a Gateway background service for adaptive reporting.

state_path.description: Optional path to agent state JSON. Default: ~/.clawwatch/agent.json (or CLAWWATCH_STATE).

worker_base_url.description: ClawWatch Worker base URL (no trailing slash required). Default: https://cw.osglab.win — override for self-hosted Workers.
